listings.title: Modern 3 BHK Luxury Flat with South Facing Balconies
listings.description: Beautiful 3-bedroom, 3-bathroom flat in Dhanmondi. High floor, 24/7 security, lift, standby generator, and dedicated parking. Walking distance to Lake and major hospitals/schools.

listings.title: Premium West-Facing residential plot in Sector 12
listings.description: Ready-to-build 5 Katha residential plot in Uttara Sector 12. Demarcated boundary walls, high land, utility connections (gas, electricity, water) already approved.

listings.title: Exquisite Teak Wood 3+2+1 Sofa Set with Cushions
listings.description: Authentic Segun (Chittagong Teak) wood sofa set in pristine condition. Comfortable premium velvet-upholstered cushions included. Hand-carved classic visual designs.

listings.title: Cozy Studio Flat/Mess for Students & Professionals
listings.description: Affordable studio apartment in Bashundhara R/A. High-speed internet connection, attached bathroom, tiny kitchenette, tiles floor, and security guards.

listings.title: Semi-Furnished Modern 1650 Sft Flat in Banani
listings.description: Elegant 3 Bedrooms, 4 Bathrooms apartment with state-of-the-art kitchen, cabinets, ACs, geysers, Intercom and complete wooden floors. Extremely prime location near Road 11.

listings.title: Solid Oak Wood 6-Chair Dining Table Set
listings.description: Imported Malaysian high-grade Oak wood dining table with 6 cushion chairs. Glass top (10mm tempered glass) included. Nil scratches, only used for 1 year.
